name: Hollands Kroon (Netherlands)
description: A white field bearing the municipal lotus/crown logo and the name 'gemeente Hollands Kroon'.
history: Flag of the municipality of Hollands Kroon in the province of North Holland, formed in 2012. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the municipal lotus/crown logo and wordmark 'gemeente Hollands Kroon'
